info.english_meaning: to jump to leap to make something fly to pull up to cover
info.hindI_arTa: kUdanA PudakanA Upara uWAnA uq0AnA AcCAdita karanA QakanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aTANgAramAskOti' (Sa0 brA0 1215) AskOti karzati bahizkaroti nizkAsayati loke skuY krEyAdikaH sOvAdikaSca
'yo asyAH karRAvAskunotyA sa devezu vfScate' (aTarva0 1246) Askunoti AtfRatti viDyati AcCinatti CidraM karoti
'sa no vfzannamuM caruM satrAdAvannapA vfDi asmaByamapratizkutaH' (f0 176)
